name: What if my boss fires me after my neck injury at work?
description: Illegal retaliation; file wrongful discharge claim with proof.[7]

mainEntity.name: What if my boss fires me after my neck injury at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; file wrongful discharge claim with proof.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah and Idaho prohibit retaliation for filing workers' comp; it's illegal discharge.[7] Key factors: (1) Timing suggests retaliation; (2) Prove injury report led to firing; (3) File wrongful termination claim. Document communications. You have protections against reprisal.
